Author: Ninethirty77
Name: The GreenZone
Description: Records observed Company Credits totals and shows weekly GC Seals tier progression, FC progress rings, and an optional overlay. Use /fcmetrics to open the window.
Changelog:
Recent updates:
- FC target progress now uses shared weekly target data so everyone sees the same FC progress.
- Added phone-friendly shared week/base updates through GitHub Actions.
- Prevented weekly FC target progress from rebasing to later samples and appearing to go backwards.
- Fixed GC Seal tracking for Priority Seal Allowance bonus chat messages.
- Removed FC name display and unused FC-name reading logic.
- Simplified the main window so the weekly reset bar appears first.
- Moved FC totals, recorded time, shared week base, estimated FC credits, player name, and overlay button into the FC target panel.
- Tier rows now show cleaner Tier labels, gold text, and hover-to-reveal Gil rewards.
- Updated FC credit labels and the GreenZone-active FC target ring color.
